# Pull Request

## 📝 Description

Brief description of the changes and their purpose.

## 🔧 Type of Change

Please check the relevant option:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/formatting changes
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvements/additions
- [ ] 🔧 Maintenance/chores

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] Tests pass locally with `yarn test`
- [ ] Code coverage maintained or improved
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing performed (if applicable)

## 🔒 Security Considerations

- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Security-related changes reviewed carefully
- [ ] Cryptographic operations verified (if applicable)
- [ ] Input validation implemented (if applicable)

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Code is commented, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] Corresponding documentation updated
- [ ] No new linting errors introduced
- [ ] Changes tested on multiple environments (if applicable)

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## 📊 Performance Impact

- [ ] No significant performance impact
- [ ] Performance improvements included
- [ ] Performance benchmarks run (if applicable)
- [ ] Gas usage optimizations considered (for contract changes)

## 🌟 Additional Notes

Any additional information that reviewers should know about this PR.
